seo_description: Current time in Sacramento, California. Pacific Time Zone — PST (UTC-8) in winter, PDT (UTC-7) during DST.

faq.question: What time is it in Sacramento right now?
faq.answer: Sacramento, California, USA uses Pacific Standard Time (PST, UTC-8) in winter and Pacific Daylight Time (PDT, UTC-7) during Daylight Saving Time. The IANA identifier is America/Los_Angeles. Sacramento is on the same time as San Francisco, Los Angeles, Portland, and Seattle — 3 hours behind New York and 8 hours behind London during standard time. The live clock above shows the current Sacramento time.

faq.question: What time zone is Sacramento in?
faq.answer: Sacramento, California is in the Pacific Time Zone (PT). It uses Pacific Standard Time (PST, UTC-8) from the first Sunday in November to the second Sunday in March, and Pacific Daylight Time (PDT, UTC-7) during Daylight Saving Time. The IANA identifier is America/Los_Angeles. Sacramento shares its time zone with San Francisco, Los Angeles, Las Vegas, Seattle, and Portland.

faq.question: Does Sacramento observe daylight saving time?
faq.answer: Yes. Sacramento, California observes Daylight Saving Time. Clocks spring forward 1 hour on the second Sunday in March at 2:00 AM (PST → PDT) and fall back on the first Sunday in November at 2:00 AM (PDT → PST). California (including Sacramento) follows the standard US DST schedule.

faq.question: What is the time difference between Sacramento and New York?
faq.answer: Sacramento (PST/PDT) is always 3 hours behind New York (EST/EDT). Both cities observe DST on the same schedule, keeping the gap constant year-round. When it is 9:00 AM in New York, it is 6:00 AM in Sacramento. The best overlap window for business calls is 12:00 PM–5:00 PM Eastern (9:00 AM–2:00 PM Pacific).

faq.question: What is the time difference between Sacramento and Chicago?
faq.answer: Sacramento (PST/PDT, Pacific Time) is always 2 hours behind Chicago (CST/CDT, Central Time). Both cities observe DST on the same schedule, so the 2-hour gap is constant year-round. When it is 10:00 AM in Chicago, it is 8:00 AM in Sacramento.

faq.question: What are typical business hours in Sacramento?
faq.answer: Standard business hours in Sacramento are 9:00 AM to 5:00 PM PT, Monday through Friday. Sacramento is California's state capital, so government offices typically operate 8:00 AM–5:00 PM PT. The Sacramento downtown business district and K Street have a mix of government, finance, and retail operations. State government buildings follow official California state office hours.

faq.question: Is Sacramento in the same time zone as San Francisco?
faq.answer: Yes. Sacramento and San Francisco are both in the Pacific Time Zone (IANA: America/Los_Angeles). They use PST (UTC-8) in winter and PDT (UTC-7) during Daylight Saving Time. Sacramento is approximately 90 miles northeast of San Francisco — they always share the exact same time.
